pi_items.source: Task setup_task.sh creates this file at this path
Task specification and verifier.py expect output at this path

pi_items.verified_value: Arial, Helvetica, Georgia, Palatino Linotype (per NIH SF424 guidelines). Liberation Sans is accepted by verifier as Linux equivalent but not officially NIH-approved.
pi_items.source: NIH SF424 (R&R) Application Guide and web search of NIH formatting requirements. Verifier code at line 38-41 confirms Liberation Sans is included in APPROVED_FONTS set.
NIH SF424 requires 11-point size or larger. Web search confirms: 'Font size must be 11 points or larger'

pi_items.verified_value: At least 0.5 inches (≥ 0.5") per NIH SF424. Metadata value is ambiguous and verifier logic is inverted.
pi_items.source: NIH SF424 requires 'at least 0.5 inches on all sides'. Web search confirms: 'Use at least 0.5 inches on all sides.' However, verifier.py checks margin <= 0.5 inches (line 108: emu <= (HALF_INCH_EMU + TOLERANCE_EMU)), which is backwards.
Task description explicitly lists these 6 section headings. Setup_task.sh creates all 6 headings. README.md confirms 'six major section headings'

pi_items.verified_value: Full header should be: 'Chen, S. — R01CA298471 — Tumor Microenvironment Immunotherapy'
pi_items.source: Task description at line 5 specifies: 'a document header on every page reading exactly "Chen, S. — R01CA298471 — Tumor Microenvironment Immunotherapy" aligned to the left'

Web search of NIH grants database (report.nih.gov, HHS TAGGS) found no record of R01CA298471. Search returned similar R01CA grants (R01CA295874, R01CA281984, R01CA284732, R01CA293456) but not R01CA298471. This grant ID does not appear in any NIH database.

pi_items.metadata_value: PA-23-093: Research on Biobehavioral Mechanisms Linking Social Determinants of Health to Cancer Risk and Progression
pi_items.source: Web search of site:grants.nih.gov returned no results for 'PA-23-093'. General NIH search returned various PAs (PA-23-230 through PA-23-233, PAR-21-093, PAR-22-093, PAR-08-093) but no PA-23-093. The exact announcement does not appear to exist in NIH records.

pi_items.metadata_value: Modulating Tumor-Infiltrating Macrophage Polarization States to Enhance Anti-PD-1 Immunotherapy Response in Non-Small Cell Lung Cancer
pi_items.verified_value: Grant project title matches setup_task.sh (line 45) and is realistic for NCI funding, but the underlying grant (R01CA298471) does not exist
pi_items.source: Task README.md line 45 provides project description matching setup_task.sh content

privileged_info_summary: The task is entirely synthetic. The NIH R01 grant application draft (r01_draft.docx) is generated programmatically by setup_task.sh with intentional formatting violations: 1-inch margins (should be 0.5"), Liberation Serif 10pt font (should be approved fonts at 11pt+), no document header, no heading styles, and no hanging indents. The grant identifier R01CA298471 and program announcement PA-23-093 do not exist in any NIH database and appear to be fabricated for this benchmark. The document content concerns tumor microenvironment immunotherapy research, which is scientifically plausible but tied to a non-existent grant. The verifier.py has a logic error: it checks that margins are ≤ 0.5 inches, but NIH actually requires margins ≥ 0.5 inches (at minimum). The approved fonts list in metadata incorrectly includes 'Liberation Sans' alongside official NIH fonts, though the verifier accepts it as a Linux equivalent.
